_README: Zoho CRM Validation Rules Configuration - Prevents empty/invalid data entry
_INSTRUCTIONS: Implement these rules in Zoho CRM: Setup > Customization > Modules > [Module] > Validation Rules
_PRIORITY: HIGH - Implement immediately after data remediation to prevent future data quality issues

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Product_Category_Required
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Ensures all Parent SKUs have a product category assigned
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ❌ Product Category is required before saving. Please select from: Furniture, Electronics, Textiles, Home Décor, Office Supplies, Industrial Equipment, Packaging Materials, or Other.
Parent_MTP_SKU.implementation_notes: Apply to Create and Edit layouts. Block save if empty.

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Billed_Physical_Weight_Required
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Ensures weight is positive and non-zero
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ❌ Billed Physical Weight must be greater than 0 kg. Enter the actual product weight in kilograms.
Parent_MTP_SKU.implementation_notes: Weight in KG. Reject zero or negative values.

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Weight_Category_Required
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Ensures weight category is assigned for billing
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ❌ Weight Category is required for billing. Select: <5kg, 5-20kg, 20-50kg, or >50kg.
Parent_MTP_SKU.implementation_notes: Picklist validation. Ensure one value selected.

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Live_Status_Required
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Ensures product live status is explicitly set
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ❌ Live Status is required. Select: Y (Live), N (Not Live), or P (Pending).
Parent_MTP_SKU.implementation_notes: Picklist with 3 values: Y, N, P

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Weight_Category_Matches_Weight
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Validates that weight category matches actual weight value
Parent_MTP_SKU.condition: (Billed_Physical_Weight < 5 AND Weight_Category_Billed != '<5kg') OR (Billed_Physical_Weight >= 5 AND Billed_Physical_Weight < 20 AND Weight_Category_Billed != '5-20kg') OR (Billed_Physical_Weight >= 20 AND Billed_Physical_Weight < 50 AND Weight_Category_Billed != '20-50kg') OR (Billed_Physical_Weight >= 50 AND Weight_Category_Billed != '>50kg')
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ⚠️ Weight Category doesn't match actual weight. Please verify the weight value and category are consistent.
Parent_MTP_SKU.implementation_notes: Warning only, doesn't block save. Helps catch data entry errors.

Parent_MTP_SKU.name: Product_Name_Required
Parent_MTP_SKU.description: Ensures MTP product name is not empty
Parent_MTP_SKU.error_message: ❌ Product MTP Name is required. Enter a descriptive product name.

Products.name: Product_Category_Required
Products.description: Ensures all child products inherit or have category
Products.error_message: ❌ Product Category is required. This should match the Parent MTP SKU category.
Products.implementation_notes: Ideally auto-populated from Parent MTP SKU via workflow

Products.name: Weight_Category_Required_For_Live
Products.description: Live products must have weight category
Products.condition: (Live_Status == 'Y' OR Product_Active == true) AND (Weight_Category_Billed == null OR Weight_Category_Billed == '')
Products.error_message: ❌ Weight Category is required for live/active products. Select appropriate weight range.

Products.name: Live_Status_Required
Products.description: Child products must have live status set
Products.error_message: ❌ Live Status is required. Select: Y (Live), N (Not Live), or P (Pending).
Products.implementation_notes: Match parent's live status by default

Products.name: Total_Weight_Positive
Products.description: Audited weight must be positive if set
Products.error_message: ❌ Audited Weight cannot be zero or negative. Enter actual weight in kg or leave empty.
Products.implementation_notes: Allow null for unaudited products, but reject invalid values

Products.name: MTP_SKU_Required
Products.description: Child products must link to parent MTP SKU
Products.error_message: ❌ MTP SKU lookup is required. Every product must be linked to a Parent MTP SKU.

implementation_guide.step_5: Create new rule for each validation above
implementation_guide.step_6: Test by creating/editing a record with invalid data
implementation_guide.step_8: Repeat for all rules in both modules

testing_checklist: ✅ Try creating Parent SKU without category - should block
✅ Try creating Parent SKU with weight = 0 - should block
✅ Try saving with mismatched weight/category - should warn
✅ Try creating Product without MTP SKU link - should block
✅ Try setting live product without weight category - should block
✅ Verify existing valid records still save normally
rollback_plan: If validation rules cause issues, disable them temporarily via Setup > Customization > Modules > [Module] > Validation Rules > Deactivate
